title: trigonostemon malayanus
intro: Trigonostemon malayanus is a type of plant species, also known as the "Malayan dragon root," which belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Trigonostemon malayanus include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Trigonostemon malayanus can be prepared into herbal tea, tincture, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
